MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Nov-30-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT WENDELL MCARTHUR'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS.

APPEARANCES: Robert Silver, Esq. of Nemecek & Cole 818/788-9500 (appearing via CourtCall) & Kevin D. Morris, Esq. of Andre, Morris & Buttery 805/937-1400 for deft & moving party; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Granted. Defendant was acting within the scope of his employment. No substantial connection with California is established. Request for continuance is denied. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Transfer Of Venue To San Luis Obispo County
Off Calendar Nov-30-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS KEVIN D. MORRIS AND ANDRE, MORRIS & BUTTERY'S MOTION FOR TRANSFER OF VENUE TO SAN LUIS OBISPO COUNTY.

APPEARANCES: Robert Silver, Esq. of Nemecek & Cole 818/788-9500 (appearing via CourtCall) & Kevin D. Morris, Esq. of Andre, Morris & Buttery 805/937-1400 for defts & moving parties; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Granted. Venue is only proper in the county in which the defendants, or some of them, reside. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
